chapter_title.en: The Saying When the Rooster Crows

text: 1396 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ فِيهِ نَزَلَتْ «وَ اَلطَّيْرُ صَافّٰاتٍ كُلٌّ قَدْ عَلِمَ صَلاٰتَهُ وَ تَسْبِيحَهُ » »

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1396 - It is narrated:
"Concerning this, the verse was revealed: 'And the birds with wings outspread; each knows its prayer and its glorification.'".
